title: RPutils
description: A simple mod for role-playing adding commands like: /roll (numeric roll), /me, /do, /twitter (fake twitter)
body:
The perfect mod for those who love role-playing games. (and for those who don't want to mix plugins and mods for this same function ahem)

functional commands: /roll, /me, /do, /entorno, /anuncio, etc...

Disclaimer: if you want to use my mod in modpacks that's fine, you will only put credits but if you want to use it to record, minecraft series, content, etc... the creators of the series will also have to put credits (participants dont have why).
